turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hi, I want to schedule a routine check-up for next week if possible.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Calling from the number we have on file. Am I speaking with Alex?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yes, that's me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It's June 12, 1990.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I need your full date of birth to continue. Could you please tell me your date of birth?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Sure, it's June 12 1990.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Do you have a preferred provider for your routine? Checkup, or would you like to see the first available?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I don't have a preferred provider. First available works for me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check the available routine, checkup appointments for next week. 1 moment.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Sure, take your time.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Check up next week. Would you prefer a morning or afternoon appointment?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I’d prefer a morning appointment.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Here are some morning options for Tuesday, July 14th.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Actually, I meant next week, not July. Can you check for morning slots next week?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Laskowski at 9:30 or 10:00 a.m. or Dr. Kelly Noble at 10:00 a.m. do any of these work for you.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I’ll take the 9:30 a.m. with Dr. Laskowski.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Your routine checkup is booked for Tuesday, July 14th. At 9:30 a.m. with Dr. Ziggy Lakosky at Pivot Point Orthopedics, please bring your photo ID.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I think you meant next week, not July 14th. Can you confirm the date again?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: And any your appointment is set for next Tuesday, July 14th, at 9:30, a.m. with Dr. Z big news across the way.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Just to clarify, is that July 14th or next Tuesday? I want to make sure I have the right date.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I'm sorry, but I meant next week, which is actually October 10th. Can you confirm that date instead?
